ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Possible side effects of the medication */,
  "usage_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for using the medication */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the medication */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the medication (e.g., pain relief, respiratory) */,
  "is_prescription_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a prescription is required for the medication */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Current stock status (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the package belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of pills in the package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the package */,
  "price_per_pill" REAL /* Price per pill in the package */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The level at which the inventory should be reordered */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* The last date the package was restocked */,
  "discount" REAL /* The discount percentage for the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the package in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* The unit price of the package in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* The discount applied to the order item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* The total price of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the customer logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* The transaction ID provided by the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The status of the payment (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* The payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option (e.g., express shipping, free shipping) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping option */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* The estimated number of days for delivery */,
  "is_insured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the shipping option includes insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipping_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option used for the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* The name of the carrier (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* The estimated delivery date */,
  "is_delivered" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the shipment has been delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipping_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_option_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shipping_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the package in the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The level at which the inventory should be reordered */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* The last date the package was restocked */,
  "is_low_stock_alert" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the inventory is at a low stock level and an alert should be sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_rewards" (
  "loyalty_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty reward entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who earned the loyalty reward */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the customer */,
  "points_earned_date" TEXT /* The date the loyalty points were earned */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the loyalty points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_rewards_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the analytic entry belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the analytic entry belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the sale */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* The date the order was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the review belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review belongs to */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date the review was written */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* The number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the content belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the content was updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the content */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the content is published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag used in the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the category belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category used in the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faq" (
  "faq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FAQ entry */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question asked by the customer */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faq_id")
)
